category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tcptunnel as a TCP port forwarder; official README calls it a simple TCP port forwarder.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives tcptunnel; current_curation.display-name also gives tcptunnel.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents help and build usage and points to the official project page for details and downloads.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/vakuum/tcptunnel; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says TCP port forwarder; official repository topics include tcp, port, and forwarder.
